meta.name: Turn WhatsApp into an AI shopping and price comparison assistant using Wati, OpenAI, Serper, and Google Sheets

parameters.content:
## 🛒 Smart Shopping Assistant – WhatsApp Price Comparison Bot

**3 independent pipelines — each does one job cleanly:**

📥 **PIPELINE A · Intake**
User sends a list → OpenAI parses every item with qty/unit/category → saved to Google Sheets → confirmation sent

🔍 **PIPELINE B · Price Engine**
User sends *compare* → for each item: Serper searches live web prices → OpenAI picks best deal → full comparison card sent back

📬 **PIPELINE C · Alerts**
Schedule runs daily 8AM → checks saved deals → sends personalised alert to any user with savings ≥ 10%

---
**Credentials:** WATI · OpenAI Header Auth · Serper Header Auth · Google Sheets OAuth2
**Serper:** free tier at serper.dev – 2500 searches/month

Node: Wati Trigger1 & Intent Router1
Function: Captures incoming WhatsApp messages via Wati.Logic: The Switch node parses the {{ $json.text }} to determine what the user wants.
compare (Price check)
deals (View saved bargains)
mylist (View shopping list)
clear (Reset list)

### 🔍 Pipeline B · Price Engine
**Flow per item:**
`Read List for Compare` → `Prepare Search Queries.`Serper – Search Prices`.`OpenAI – Extract Best Deal`.`Process Deal Result`.`Google Sheets – Save Deals`*(appends one row per item to Deals tab)*.`Aggregate Comparison Card`*(collects ALL items, calculates total, builds full card)*↓`Send a text message`
*(sends full comparison card to user)*

---
⚠️ **Important:** n8n runs each item through the chain sequentially. The `Aggregate` node uses `$input.all()` to collect every item result before sending the final message.

### 📬 Pipeline C · Daily Deal Alerts
Runs automatically every day at 8:00 AM
**Flow:**
Schedule Trigger – Daily 8AM Alerts`.`Google Sheets – Read Deals for Alert`*(reads entire Deals tab)*.`Build Alert Messages`*(filters: alertSent = No AND savingPct ≥ 10)**(groups by phone, picks top 5 deals per user)**(returns one output item per user)*.`WATI – Send Deal Alert`*(sends personalised message to each user's phone)*
---
⚠️ **To-do after import:**
- `alertSent` is not automatically updated to `Yes` after sending.
Add a `Google Sheets – Update` node after `Send Deal Alert` to set `alertSent = Yes` matching on `listId + item` to prevent duplicate alerts.

nodes.name: Google Sheets – Read List for Compare1
Google Sheets – Read Deals for Alert1

parameters.content:
**New List path:**
`OpenAI – Parse List` → `Structure List Items` (generates one row per item + ackMessage) → `Google Sheets – Save Shopping List` → `Send a text message` (confirm to user)

Sticky Note Title: 🧹 MAINTENANCE
Function: Handles the "Clear" intent.
Note: This node currently prepares the "Success" message.
Tip: Ensure you have a Google Sheets node following this (or a specific script) if you want to physically delete rows or update status to 'inactive' in your database.

Sticky Note Title: 💰 SAVINGS TRACKER
Function: Fetches the latest price data from the Deals sheet. Key Features:* Sorts by date to show the most recent prices first.De-duplicates items so the user only sees the latest deal per product.Calculates and displays Saving % and store links.

Nodes: Google Sheets – Read My List1 & Build My List View1

Function: Pulls active shopping items from the ShoppingList sheet.Groups items by Category (Dairy, Produce, etc.).Adds specific emojis based on the category for a better mobile UI.Output: Formatted WhatsApp message with a summary and total count.

main.node: Google Sheets – Read List for Compare1
Google Sheets – Read Deals for Alert1
